definitions.text: To perceive sounds through the ear. .mw-parser-output .defdate{font-size:smaller}
examples: I was deaf, but now I can hear.

definitions.text: To perceive (a sound, or something producing a sound) with the ear, to recognize (something) in an auditory way.
examples: I could hear them quarreling upstairs, but didn’t really listen to their argument.

definitions.text: To exercise this faculty intentionally; to listen to.
